title: Xbox Reviews Scraper
description: Collect Xbox game ratings and reviews from API-backed sources using game store URLs.

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: URLs to Xbox game store pages to scrape reviews from. Example: https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/arc-raiders/9NDF1F263RZ4/0010

maxReviewsPerUrl.title: Maximum reviews per URL
maxReviewsPerUrl.description: Maximum number of reviews to collect per game URL.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional. Enable Apify Proxy only if you need it.
